rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score of 8/10 and surface the same three concerns: lack of project management/UML experience, basic German below the C1 requirement, and no direct IT security/risk/compliance experience. The strengths are also functionally identical, with only minor rewording (e.g., 'team management' vs 'mentoring and leading teams', adding 'and IT architecture'). None of the differences key off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Maria Rodriguez; they are ordinary run-to-run rewording noise.
